{{Infobox character
| name = Jai Patriarch
| aliases = Patriarch
| titles = {{spoiler|book=cradle-02-soulsmith|[[Jai Patriarch|Patriarch]]}}
| affiliations = {{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|[[Jai clan]]}}
| appears_in = Cradle
| introduced = [[Soulsmith (novel)|Soulsmith]]
}}

== Overview ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|[[Jai Daishou]], known as the [[Jai]] Patriarch, is the leader of the [[Jai clan]], which is ranked third among the three great clans. An [[Underlord]] and a legendary figure, he is credited with transforming his clan from a minor wilderness faction into an [[Imperial]] power. He follows the [[Path of the Stellar Spear]] and is characterized by a strict adherence to propriety, order, and tradition. As an [[Underlord]], he possesses significant power, though he is currently in the final stages of his [[life]], with an estimated remaining lifespan of only a few years. His leadership is vital to the clan's stability, as it is believed that the [[Jai]] would collapse if he were unseated. Despite his advanced age and physical ailments, such as an aching back, he remains a formidable [[sacred artist]] capable of using his power to punish insolence or suppress others through compulsion.}}

== Soulsmith ==
<div class="wv-facts mw-collapsible mw-collapsed"><div class="wv-facts-head mw-collapsible-toggle">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">2</span></div>
<ul class="wv-fact-list mw-collapsible-content">
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-02-soulsmith|The [[Jai Patriarch]] banished [[Jai Long]] to the Wilds.<ref name="cradle-02-soulsmith-c7">''Soulsmith'', chapter 7</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-02-soulsmith|The [[Jai Patriarch]] is the target of [[Jai Long]]'s crusade.<ref name="cradle-02-soulsmith-c19">''Soulsmith'', chapter 19</ref>}}</li>
</ul></div>

== Blackflame ==
<div class="wv-facts mw-collapsible mw-collapsed"><div class="wv-facts-head mw-collapsible-toggle">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">1</span></div>
<ul class="wv-fact-list mw-collapsible-content">
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|The [[Jai clan]] has a Patriarch.<ref name="cradle-03-blackflame-c17">''Blackflame'', chapter 17</ref>}}</li>
</ul></div>

== Skysworn ==
<div class="wv-facts mw-collapsible mw-collapsed"><div class="wv-facts-head mw-collapsible-toggle">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">1</span></div>
<ul class="wv-fact-list mw-collapsible-content">
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|The [[Jai Patriarch]] is a character who exited a [[labyrinth]] with a prize.<ref name="cradle-04-skysworn-c2">''Skysworn'', chapter 2</ref>}}</li>
</ul></div>

== Bloodline ==
<div class="wv-facts mw-collapsible mw-collapsed"><div class="wv-facts-head mw-collapsible-toggle">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">2</span></div>
<ul class="wv-fact-list mw-collapsible-content">
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|The Patriarch of the [[Wei clan]] spreads commands throughout [[Wei territory]].<ref name="cradle-09-bloodline-c12">''Bloodline'', chapter 12</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|[[Lindon]] nudged the Patriarch with his toe.<ref name="cradle-09-bloodline-c12" />}}</li>
</ul></div>

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Cradle nav}}

[[Category:Characters]]
[[Category:Soulsmith]]
[[Category:Blackflame]]
[[Category:Skysworn]]
[[Category:Bloodline]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle characters]]
[[Category:Titled characters]]
